roles.title: 功能测试智能体
roles.responsibility: 按配置主线验证启动、创角、挂机、地图、NPC、战斗自动结算、物件、章节返回。
roles.passRule: Every recorded step has a visible DOM click or a deliberate capture-only assertion, reaches its expected state, and writes a screenshot.

roles.title: 交互与条件测试智能体
roles.responsibility: 验证门禁、角色替换、切磋前后分支、重复挂机和返回路径；禁止用前端假放行代替条件结果。
roles.passRule: All condition assertions pass and no action is marked accepted without a configuration-backed result.

roles.title: 战斗表现测试智能体
roles.responsibility: 验证切磋进入、自动战斗、自动结算、血量、伤害、日志和禁止手动继续按钮；同时记录视觉差距。
roles.passRule: Combat starts from a visible NPC action, exposes no manual continue/settlement control, returns through configured resolution, and records screenshots.

roles.title: 移动端UX/UI验收智能体
roles.responsibility: 以真实540x960页面核查信息层级、文字可读性、触点、地图重叠、任务反馈、NPC和物件界面；只记录与竞品参考有证据的差异。
roles.passRule: The agent produces a screenshot-backed finding for every inspected surface; visual parity requires explicit human/product signoff and cannot auto-pass.

roles.title: 美术与包装验收智能体
roles.responsibility: 逐张核查真实浏览器画面中的场景、角色、物件、图标、特效、色彩和视觉层级；明确区分竞品内部研究资源、可用占位和需要自制的正式资产。
roles.passRule: Every real-browser screenshot receives an asset/presentation verdict. Placeholder art, missing unit feedback, and unproven competitor asset use block product visual acceptance.

roles.title: 竞品证据与配置验收智能体
roles.responsibility: 把网页动作映射回放置江湖 Lua、地图角色、条件与结果记录；无法确认的动作必须保持未知或隐藏。
roles.passRule: Each sampled visible action has a source evidence path and a real-browser result; unsupported actions are reported rather than simulated.

roles.title: 发布门禁智能体
roles.responsibility: 汇总其他角色的浏览器证据，分离产品失败、未覆盖、基础设施失败与视觉未达标，给出阻断结论。
roles.passRule: Release can pass only when all visible actions are covered or intentionally hidden, no executor gaps remain, and UX/UI has explicit signoff.
